name: SQL Injection Hardening
title: Prevent SQL Injection with Parameterized Queries
description: Given a search input, implement a secure SQL query search endpoint in Python using parameterized queries to prevent SQL injection vulnerabilities. Never use string formatting or concatenation in SQL queries.

name: XSS Prevention
title: Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) Prevention
description: Implement a content submission endpoint that sanitizes user-supplied HTML using the Bleach library. Configure an allowlist of safe tags and attributes. Return sanitized content and demonstrate rejection of script tags.

name: CSRF Protection
title: CSRF Token Protection for Form Endpoints
description: Implement CSRF protection for form-based endpoints in FastAPI. Generate per-session CSRF tokens, validate the token on POST requests, and reject requests with missing or invalid tokens.

name: AES-GCM Encryption
title: Encrypt PII Database Columns with AES-GCM
description: Implement a Python class to encrypt and decrypt sensitive fields (like SSN and phone number) before saving them to a database. Use AES-GCM (256-bit) encryption via the cryptography library.

name: Security Headers Middleware
title: HTTP Security Headers Middleware
description: Add a FastAPI middleware that sets OWASP-recommended HTTP security headers: Content-Security-Policy, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy.

name: File Upload Validation
title: Secure File Upload with MIME Validation
description: Create a FastAPI endpoint /upload that accepts files, validates the MIME type by reading magic bytes (not just extension), restricts to JPEG/PNG/PDF under 10MB, and scans using ClamAV before storing.

name: Dependency Audit Script
title: Python Dependency Vulnerability Audit
description: Write a Python script that reads requirements.txt, calls the PyPI JSON API for each package, and checks if there are known vulnerabilities reported in the OSV database. Output a formatted report.

name: Secrets Scanner
title: Secrets Leak Detection Script
description: Create a pre-commit hook script in Python that scans staged files for leaked secrets (AWS access keys, private keys, .env patterns, API key patterns) using regex patterns. Fail the commit if any are found.

name: Input Sanitization API
title: Comprehensive Input Sanitization Layer
description: Implement a Pydantic-based input sanitization layer that strips null bytes, limits string lengths, rejects non-UTF8 inputs, and normalizes Unicode NFC. Apply it as a FastAPI middleware.

name: IP Allowlist Middleware
title: IP Allowlist Enforcement Middleware
description: Create a FastAPI middleware that enforces an IP allowlist for admin endpoints. Read the allowed CIDR ranges from configuration, support IPv4 and IPv6, and return 403 for requests from unlisted IPs.

name: Audit Log System
title: Immutable Security Audit Log
description: Design an audit logging system for a FastAPI application. Log all state-changing operations (create, update, delete) with user ID, timestamp, action type, entity type, and old/new values. Make the log append-only.

name: Error Sanitization
title: Sanitize API Error Responses
description: Implement a global exception handler in FastAPI that catches unhandled exceptions and returns sanitized error responses, never leaking stack traces, internal paths, or database errors to clients.
